qa_pairs.question: What CUDA version is necessary for running simulations on A100 GPUs located on Narval?
qa_pairs.answer: cuda/11.4 is required for running simulations on A100 GPUs installed on Narval.

qa_pairs.question: Which MD programs are included in the CPU-only Amber/20 modules?
qa_pairs.answer: CPU-only Amber/20 modules provide all MD programs available in AmberTools/20, in addition to pmemd (serial) and pmemd.MPI (parallel).

qa_pairs.question: What additional programs do the GPU Amber/20 modules offer?
qa_pairs.answer: GPU Amber/20 modules add pmemd.cuda for single GPU simulations and pmemd.cuda.MPI for multi-GPU simulations.

qa_pairs.question: Which specific program is used for single GPU molecular dynamics simulations with Amber/20?
qa_pairs.answer: For single GPU molecular dynamics simulations with Amber/20, the pmemd.cuda program is used.

qa_pairs.question: Which program supports multi-GPU molecular dynamics simulations with Amber/20?
qa_pairs.answer: The pmemd.cuda.MPI program supports multi-GPU molecular dynamics simulations with Amber/20.
